response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering practices and learning ability, they fall significantly short on critical role requirements: native-level Japanese language proficiency (required), strong C programming skills (insufficient recent experience—last C work was 2014-2015), embedded systems and Linux kernel development experience, and security-focused domain knowledge. The candidate's background is predominantly web, backend, and mobile development, not embedded firmware for network switches.
strengths: Extensive software development experience across multiple domains with proven ability to master new technologies quickly
Strong emphasis on code quality, testing practices, and software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD) throughout career
Experience building high-performance, low-latency systems handling real-time data at scale
concerns: Does not meet required native-level Japanese language proficiency—a mandatory qualification for the role
Insufficient C programming experience: most recent C work was 2014-2015; role requires strong current proficiency for embedded firmware development
Lacks embedded systems, networking protocols, and Linux kernel development background—career is primarily web/backend focused

key_factors.factor: C programming proficiency and embedded systems experience
General software engineering quality and learning ability
